---
name: Question or feedback
about: Ask how to use Shroud, or tell us how you're using it
title: "feedback: "
labels: question
---

**Your question or feedback**
Anything — usage help, what's working, what's not.

**Are you using Shroud in a real project?** (totally optional, helps us prioritize)
- What are you building?
- Which SDK(s): openai / @anthropic-ai/sdk / ai / core only?
- Would a hosted or compliance-focused version be useful to you? Why / why not?
